description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single release stage and a job named build that runs in the mrroman/graalvm-ce Docker image. The build job should download the Leiningen script using wget, execute it with bash to install Leiningen, run "bash ./lein uberjar" to create an uberjar, and then run native-image -jar target/cljfmt-graalvm-0.1.0-SNAPSHOT-standalone.jar -H:Name="cljfmt" to compile a native binary named cljfmt. It should publish the resulting ./cljfmt file as an artifact. No services, caches, or special rules are required.
